1→
2→ 3→ 4→ 5→# MemoryTree Workflow 6→ 7→**Persistent, Git-tracked project memory for AI coding assistants.** 8→ 9→[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-blue.svg)](LICENSE) 10→[![Python 3.11+](https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-3.11%2B-3776AB.svg?logo=python&logoColor=white)](https://www.python.org/) 11→[![Claude Code](https://img.shields.io/badge/Claude_Code-Skill-cc785c.svg?logo=anthropic&logoColor=white)](https://claude.ai/claude-code) 12→[![Platform](https://img.shields.io/badge/Platform-macOS%20%7C%20Linux%20%7C%20Windows-lightgrey.svg)](#requirements) 13→ 14→

15→ Install  •  16→ Usage  •  17→ Features  •  18→ Heartbeat  •  19→ Scripts  •  20→ Docs 21→

22→ 23→
24→ 25→--- 26→ 27→## What It Does 28→ 29→MemoryTree gives AI coding assistants (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI) a structured memory layer that survives across sessions: 30→ 31→| | Feature | Description | 32→|---|---------|-------------| 33→| :dart: | **Goals** | Track your project's north star across sessions | 34→| :white_check_mark: | **Todos** | Version-bound task lists that stay in sync with goals | 35→| :speech_balloon: | **Chat Logs** | Append-only session records for full traceability | 36→| :books: | **Knowledge** | Durable notes, specs, and architecture decisions (also stored in goals when scope-relevant) | 37→| :inbox_tray: | **Transcripts** | Import and archive AI chat history from Codex, Claude Code, and Gemini CLI | 38→ 39→All stored as plain Markdown files under `Memory/`, tracked by Git, minimal dependencies. 40→ 41→## Install 42→ 43→```bash 44→git clone https://github.com/beyondchenlin/memorytree-workflow ~/.claude/skills/memorytree-workflow 45→``` 46→ 47→On Windows (Git Bash): 48→```bash 49→git clone https://github.com/beyondchenlin/memorytree-workflow "$USERPROFILE/.claude/skills/memorytree-workflow" 50→``` 51→ 52→## Usage 53→ 54→In any Claude Code session, run: 55→ 56→``` 57→/memorytree-workflow 58→``` 59→ 60→The skill will immediately: 61→1. **Detect** — check if the current repo has MemoryTree installed 62→2. **Alert** — display pending notifications from `~/.memorytree/alerts.json` 63→3. **Init** — if missing, scaffold `AGENTS.md` and `Memory/` folders 64→4. **Upgrade** — if partial, add missing pieces without overwriting existing policy 65→5. **Maintain** — if installed, read the active goal/todo and report current state 66→ 67→No manual confirmation needed — the skill acts on the detection result immediately. 68→ 69→## Architecture 70→ 71→### Per-Repository Structure 72→ 73→After initialization, your repo will have: 74→ 75→``` 76→AGENTS.md # AI behavior rules for this repo 77→Memory/ 78→ 01_goals/ # Versioned project goals 79→ 02_todos/ # Task lists bound to goals 80→ 03_chat_logs/ # Append-only session logs 81→ 04_knowledge/ # (optional) Durable project notes 82→ 05_archive/ # (optional) Retired goals/todos 83→ 06_transcripts/ # (optional) AI chat history archive 84→ clean/ # Cleaned Markdown indexes 85→ manifests/ # Import metadata 86→ raw/ # Raw transcript mirrors 87→``` 88→ 89→### Global Directory (`~/.memorytree/`) 90→ 91→Cross-project shared state: 92→ 93→``` 94→~/.memorytree/ 95→ config.toml # User-level settings 96→ alerts.json # Pending notifications 97→ heartbeat.lock # Single-instance lock 98→ logs/ # Heartbeat execution logs 99→ transcripts/ # Global transcript archive 100→ raw/ # By client/project/year/month 101→ clean/ # Cleaned Markdown 102→ index/ 103→ sessions.jsonl # Session metadata 104→ search.sqlite # Full-text search index 105→``` 106→ 107→For the full schema see [`references/global-configuration.md`](references/global-configuration.md). 108→ 109→## Features 110→ 111→### Memory Management 112→ 113→| Memory Type | Behavior | 114→|-------------|----------| 115→| **Goals** | Changed only after explicit user confirmation of a scope or requirement change. Versioned. | 116→| **Todos** | Kept in sync with the active goal. Updated when progress changes or next task becomes clearer. | 117→| **Chat Logs** | Append-only. Never rewritten or deleted. | 118→| **Knowledge** | Stores architecture decisions, product ideas, operating constraints. Goals may also hold scope-relevant items. | 119→| **Archive** | Stale context moved here or to knowledge files to keep active files concise. | 120→ 121→### Multi-Client Transcript Import 122→ 123→Import AI chat history from three clients: 124→ 125→| Client | Source | 126→|--------|--------| 127→| **Codex** | `~/.codex/sessions/**/rollout-*.jsonl` | 128→| **Claude Code** | `transcript_path` if exposed; otherwise `~/.claude/projects//*.jsonl` | 129→| **Gemini CLI** | Saved chats first; checkpoints under `~/.gemini/tmp//checkpoints` if enabled | 130→ 131→Key principles: 132→ 133→- Raw transcripts preserved unchanged as source of truth 134→- Cleaned Markdown generated by **deterministic code** (not model tokens) 135→- Current repo only stores transcripts belonging to this project; others go to global archive only 136→- First import asks once whether raw transcripts may be committed to the repo 137→ 138→### Cross-Project Search 139→ 140→When searching all memories or chat history: 141→ 142→1. Query `search.sqlite` for fast full-text lookup 143→2. Use `sessions.jsonl` for session-level metadata filtering (client, project, date range) 144→3. Load matching cleaned Markdown for context; confirm exact wording against raw transcripts 145→4. Combine with the current repo's `Memory/` files 146→5. Fall back to scanning `clean/` directory if the index does not exist 147→ 148→### Session Continuity 149→ 150→When you open a new session and want to continue where you left off, ask MemoryTree to show your most recent conversation: 151→ 152→> "Look at my last chat" / "看看我最近的聊天" / "Continue where I left off" 153→ 154→The skill will: 155→ 156→1. **Instant sync** — immediately scan all three client directories (not waiting for the scheduled heartbeat) 157→2. **Locate** — find the latest session for the current project across Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI 158→3. **Summarize** — generate a continuation summary: what was discussed, what was tried, and what remains unresolved 159→4. **Handoff** — you can say "continue" and pick up exactly where the previous session stopped 160→ 161→This works **cross-client**: a Codex session can be recovered from Claude Code, and vice versa. 162→ 163→For details see [`references/transcript-archive.md`](references/transcript-archive.md) and [`references/heartbeat-scheduling.md`](references/heartbeat-scheduling.md). 164→ 165→### Git Safety 166→ 167→MemoryTree follows strict isolation rules to never interfere with your repo's workflow: 168→ 169→| Rule | Description | 170→|------|-------------| 171→| File isolation | Only stages/commits `Memory/**` (excluding `raw/` until approved) and `AGENTS.md` (when managed by MemoryTree) | 172→| Branch isolation | Uses dedicated branch `memorytree/--` | 173→| Commit format | `memorytree(): ` or repo-compatible equivalent | 174→| PR isolation | Separate PR for MemoryTree-only changes | 175→| Auto-merge | Only when repo still enforces its review and CI checks | 176→| Auto-push | On by default; skips if no remote; fast-forward only | 177→| Protected branches | Never overrides branch protection or CI rules | 178→ 179→The skill stops and asks before proceeding in 8 scenarios: mixed product code, AGENTS.md conflicts, unclear target branch, repo forbids bot pushes, CI conflicts, unknown raw transcript permission, cross-project transcripts, or protected branch refusal. 180→ 181→For the full policy see [`references/git-policy.md`](references/git-policy.md). 182→ 183→### Sensitive Info Scanning 184→ 185→During transcript cleaning, the heartbeat scans for API keys, passwords, tokens, and other secrets: 186→ 187→- Matches are logged as warnings and written to `alerts.json` 188→- **No automatic deletion or redaction** — the user decides how to handle them 189→ 190→### Locale Support 191→ 192→| Feature | Description | 193→|---------|-------------| 194→| Templates | English (`en`) and Simplified Chinese (`zh-cn`) | 195→| Auto-detect | Detects language from repo content first, then system locale | 196→| Reply language | Follows user explicit request > message language > repo locale > template locale > `en` | 197→| Non-destructive | Never rewrites existing files just to translate them | 198→ 199→### Environment Adaptation 200→ 201→MemoryTree does not assume the target repo has a Python environment: 202→ 203→``` 204→Prefer uv run python → fall back to system python → fall back to direct template scaffolding 205→``` 206→ 207→Never auto-creates `.venv` or `pyproject.toml` inside the project. 208→ 209→## Background Heartbeat 210→ 211→The heartbeat automates transcript discovery, import, cleaning, commit, and push without consuming model tokens or requiring human intervention. 212→ 213→**Execution flow**: 214→ 215→``` 216→Acquire lock → Load config.toml → Iterate projects → Discover → Import 217→→ Clean → Commit → (auto_push) Push → Release lock → Exit 218→``` 219→ 220→### Install the daemon 221→ 222→```bash 223→memorytree-daemon install 224→``` 225→ 226→### CLI commands 227→ 228→| Command | Description | 229→|-----------------------------|-------------| 230→| `memorytree-daemon install` | Register the heartbeat with the OS scheduler (cron / launchd / Task Scheduler). | 231→| `memorytree-daemon uninstall` | Remove the scheduled heartbeat task. | 232→| `memorytree-daemon run-once` | Run a single heartbeat cycle immediately. | 233→| `memorytree-daemon watch` | Continuous loop for development and debugging only. | 234→| `memorytree-daemon status` | Show registration state and last execution result. | 235→ 236→### Key settings (`~/.memorytree/config.toml`) 237→ 238→| Setting | Default | Description | 239→|----------------------|----------|-------------| 240→| `auto_push` | `true` | Push to remote after each commit. Skips if no remote is configured. | 241→| `heartbeat_interval` | `"5m"` | Interval between heartbeat executions. | 242→| `log_level` | `"info"` | Log verbosity (`debug`, `info`, `warn`, `error`). | 243→ 244→### Design constraints 245→ 246→- Single execution, stateless, idempotent — safe to re-run at any interval 247→- One computer = one scheduled heartbeat task 248→- Will not silently register — always confirms before `install` 249→ 250→For details see [`references/heartbeat-scheduling.md`](references/heartbeat-scheduling.md) and [`references/global-configuration.md`](references/global-configuration.md). 251→ 252→## Design Principles 253→ 254→| Principle | How | 255→|-----------|-----| 256→| **Zero intrusion** | Never changes the repo's branch model, CI, or review process | 257→| **Minimal dependencies** | Scripts target Python standard library; no third-party packages required at install time | 258→| **Deterministic** | Transcript cleaning done by code, not model tokens | 259→| **Single source of truth** | Each concept defined in one reference file, others cross-reference | 260→| **Spec-driven** | Reference docs define the contract; code implements it faithfully | 261→| **User asset** | Memory belongs to the user; auto_push on by default to prevent local data loss | 262→ 263→## Scripts 264→ 265→All scripts live under `scripts/` and target Python 3.11+ stdlib only (no third-party packages). 266→ 267→### Entry Points 268→ 269→| Script | Purpose | 270→|--------|---------| 271→| [`heartbeat.py`](scripts/heartbeat.py) | Background heartbeat — discover, import, clean, commit, push transcripts | 272→| [`memorytree_daemon.py`](scripts/memorytree_daemon.py) | Daemon lifecycle manager: `install` / `uninstall` / `run-once` / `watch` / `status` | 273→| [`recall-session.py`](scripts/recall-session.py) | On-demand transcript sync and latest session recall for cross-session context recovery | 274→| [`init-memorytree.py`](scripts/init-memorytree.py) | Scaffold `Memory/` and `AGENTS.md` for a new repository | 275→| [`upgrade-memorytree.py`](scripts/upgrade-memorytree.py) | Add missing MemoryTree pieces to a partial repository | 276→| [`import-transcripts.py`](scripts/import-transcripts.py) | Import one transcript into repo mirror and global archive | 277→| [`discover-transcripts.py`](scripts/discover-transcripts.py) | Scan local client stores and mirror matching transcripts | 278→| [`detect-memorytree-locale.py`](scripts/detect-memorytree-locale.py) | Print the effective locale for a target repository | 279→ 280→### Internal Modules 281→ 282→| Module | Purpose | 283→|--------|---------| 284→| [`_transcript_utils.py`](scripts/_transcript_utils.py) | Transcript parsing (Codex/Claude/Gemini), import, SQLite indexing, discovery | 285→| [`_config_utils.py`](scripts/_config_utils.py) | Load/validate `~/.memorytree/config.toml` with `tomllib` | 286→| [`_alert_utils.py`](scripts/_alert_utils.py) | Manage `alerts.json` — dedup, threshold-based alerting, failure counts | 287→| [`_lock_utils.py`](scripts/_lock_utils.py) | PID-based lock file with atomic creation and stale lock detection | 288→| [`_log_utils.py`](scripts/_log_utils.py) | Date-rotated file logging to `~/.memorytree/logs/` | 289→| [`_scaffold_utils.py`](scripts/_scaffold_utils.py) | Template rendering and directory scaffolding helpers | 290→| [`_locale_utils.py`](scripts/_locale_utils.py) | Locale detection and normalization | 291→ 292→## Reference Docs 293→ 294→| File | Purpose | 295→|------|---------| 296→| [`references/project-detection.md`](references/project-detection.md) | Detect install state | 297→| [`references/memory-layout.md`](references/memory-layout.md) | Folder and file naming rules | 298→| [`references/update-rules.md`](references/update-rules.md) | When to version goals, todos, and session logs | 299→| [`references/git-policy.md`](references/git-policy.md) | Git defaults, auto-push, and policy merge | 300→| [`references/heartbeat-scheduling.md`](references/heartbeat-scheduling.md) | Heartbeat architecture, daemon CLI, execution flow | 301→| [`references/global-configuration.md`](references/global-configuration.md) | `~/.memorytree/` layout, `config.toml` schema, `alerts.json` format | 302→| [`references/transcript-archive.md`](references/transcript-archive.md) | Transcript archival, cleaning, search, and upload rules | 303→| [`references/locale-selection.md`](references/locale-selection.md) | Locale choice rules | 304→| [`references/response-language.md`](references/response-language.md) | Reply-language precedence | 305→| [`references/execution-environment.md`](references/execution-environment.md) | How to run scripts without a project-local Python environment | 306→| [`references/upgrade-path.md`](references/upgrade-path.md) | Safe adoption flow for partial repos | 307→ 308→## Update 309→ 310→```bash 311→cd ~/.claude/skills/memorytree-workflow && git pull 312→``` 313→ 314→## Requirements 315→ 316→- [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/claude-code) CLI 317→- Python 3.11+ (for transcript and heartbeat scripts; `tomllib` is stdlib in 3.11+) 318→- Git 319→ 320→## License 321→ 322→MIT 323→

1→name: CI
     2→
     3→on:
     4→  push:
     5→    branches: [master]
     6→  pull_request:
     7→    branches: [master]
     8→
     9→jobs:
    10→  test-python:
    11→    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    12→    strategy:
    13→      fail-fast: false
    14→      matrix:
    15→        os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest]
    16→        python-version: ["3.11", "3.12", "3.13"]
    17→
    18→    steps:
    19→      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    20→
    21→      - name: Set up Python ${{ matrix.python-version }}
    22→        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
    23→        with:
    24→          python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}
    25→
    26→      - name: Install coverage
    27→        run: pip install coverage
    28→
    29→      - name: Run tests with coverage
    30→        run: coverage run -m unittest discover -s tests
    31→
    32→      - name: Coverage report
    33→        run: coverage report --fail-under=80
    34→
    35→      - name: Generate coverage XML
    36→        if: matrix.os == 'ubuntu-latest' && matrix.python-version == '3.13'
    37→        run: coverage xml
    38→
    39→      - name: Upload coverage artifact
    40→        if: matrix.os == 'ubuntu-latest' && matrix.python-version == '3.13'
    41→        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
    42→        with:
    43→          name: coverage-report
    44→          path: coverage.xml
    45→
    46→  test-typescript:
    47→    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    48→    strategy:
    49→      fail-fast: false
    50→      matrix:
    51→        os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest]
    52→        node-version: ["20", "22"]
    53→
    54→    steps:
    55→      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    56→
    57→      - name: Set up Node.js ${{ matrix.node-version }}
    58→        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
    59→        with:
    60→          node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
    61→
    62→      - name: Install dependencies
    63→        run: npm ci
    64→
    65→      - name: Type check
    66→        run: npm run typecheck
    67→
    68→      - name: Lint
    69→        run: npm run lint
    70→
    71→      - name: Build
    72→        run: npm run build
    73→
    74→      - name: Test
    75→        run: npm test
    76→
    77→      - name: Verify CLI
    78→        run: node dist/cli.js --version
    79→

1→# Python → TypeScript 迁移计划 (v2)
     2→
     3→## 目标
     4→
     5→将 memorytree-workflow Skill 从 Python 重写为 TypeScript，消灭 Python 运行时依赖，与 Claude Code (Node.js) 同栈运行。
     6→
     7→## 原则
     8→
     9→- **增量迁移**: 分 5 个 Phase，每个 Phase 独立可交付、可测试
    10→- **TS 并行启用**: 新代码写在 `src/` 目录，Python `scripts/` 保留到全部迁移完成后删除
    11→- **测试先行**: 每个模块先写测试再实现，覆盖率 ≥ 80%
    12→- **类型优先**: 充分利用 TS 接口定义约束 transcript JSON 结构
    13→- **Golden File 验证**: 用 Python 生成 fixture，TS 必须产出字节级一致的输出
    14→
    15→---
    16→
    17→## 技术选型
    18→
    19→| 领域 | 选择 | 理由 |
    20→|------|------|------|
    21→| 运行时 | Node.js 20+ (LTS) | Claude Code 内置，18 已 EOL |
    22→| 语言 | TypeScript 5.x strict | 类型安全 |
    23→| 构建 | tsup (打包到 `dist/`) | OS 调度任务运行编译产物，不依赖 tsx |
    24→| 开发执行 | tsx | 仅 devDependency，不进入生产路径 |
    25→| 测试 | vitest ^3.x | 原生 ESM + TS，mock 完善 |
    26→| SQLite | **sql.js** (WASM) | 零 native 编译，跨平台无 node-gyp 问题 |
    27→| TOML 读 | smol-toml (parse) | 轻量无依赖 |
    28→| TOML 写 | @iarna/toml (stringify) | smol-toml 无序列化 API |
    29→| CLI | commander | 成熟稳定 |
    30→| Lint | eslint + @typescript-eslint | recommended 规则集 |
    31→
    32→### 为什么选 sql.js 而非 better-sqlite3
    33→
    34→better-sqlite3 依赖 node-gyp，在 Windows 上需要 MSVC Build Tools + **Python**（讽刺地与"消灭 Python 依赖"的目标矛盾）。sql.js 是 SQLite 的 WASM 编译版，零 native 依赖，`npm install` 即用。
    35→
    36→代价：sql.js API 是异步的，调用链需要 `async/await`。但本项目不追求极致性能（心跳周期 5 分钟），异步不是问题。
    37→
    38→---
    39→
    40→## 工程规范 (Phase 0 锁定)
    41→
    42→### tsconfig.json
    43→
    44→```jsonc
    45→{
    46→  "compilerOptions": {
    47→    "target": "ES2022",
    48→    "module": "NodeNext",
    49→    "moduleResolution": "NodeNext",
    50→    "outDir": "dist",
    51→    "rootDir": "src",
    52→    "strict": true,
    53→    "exactOptionalPropertyTypes": true,
    54→    "noUncheckedIndexedAccess": true,
    55→    "declaration": false,
    56→    "sourceMap": true,
    57→    "esModuleInterop": true,
    58→    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
    59→    "skipLibCheck": true
    60→  },
    61→  "include": ["src"],
    62→  "exclude": ["node_modules", "dist"]
    63→}
    64→```
    65→
    66→关键决策：
    67→- `module: NodeNext` — 导入路径必须带 `.js` 扩展名（`import { foo } from './bar.js'`）
    68→- `noUncheckedIndexedAccess: true` — 数组访问返回 `T | undefined`，防越界 bug
    69→- `sourceMap: true` — daemon 崩溃时 stack trace 可读
    70→
    71→### tsup 打包配置
    72→
    73→```ts
    74→// tsup.config.ts
    75→export default {
    76→  entry: { cli: 'src/cli/main.ts' },
    77→  format: ['esm'],
    78→  target: 'node20',
    79→  sourcemap: true,
    80→  clean: true,
    81→  dts: false,  // CLI 工具不需要 .d.ts
    82→}
    83→```
    84→
    85→- OS 调度任务注册 `node dist/cli.js`，**不是** `tsx src/cli/main.ts`
    86→- bin 入口文件 `#!/usr/bin/env node` 指向编译产物
    87→
    88→### Windows 路径规范
    89→
    90→所有路径写入文件（JSON / SQLite / Markdown / JSONL）时统一使用正斜杠 (posix 格式)。
    91→
    92→```ts
    93→// src/utils/path.ts
    94→import { normalize } from 'node:path'
    95→export function toPosixPath(p: string): string {
    96→  return normalize(p).replace(/\\/g, '/')
    97→}
    98→```
    99→
   100→所有模块在持久化路径前必须调用 `toPosixPath()`。
   101→
   102→### 错误处理策略
   103→
   104→- **不用 Result 类型**，使用 try/catch（与 Python 现有风格一致，降低认知负担）
   105→- 单个 project 的错误不中断整体流程（heartbeat 逐 project 包裹 try/catch）
   106→- subprocess 调用统一封装为 `exec()` helper，捕获 `child_process.execSync` 的异常
   107→- async 函数中使用 `process.on('unhandledRejection', ...)` 全局兜底
   108→- 解析器对格式错误用 `logger.debug()` 降级跳过，不抛异常
   109→
   110→### 测试 Mock 策略
   111→
   112→| 场景 | 方案 |
   113→|------|------|
   114→| 文件系统 | `memfs` 或 `vi.mock('node:fs')` |
   115→| subprocess | `vi.mock('node:child_process')` |
   116→| 时间 | `vi.setSystemTime()` |
   117→| SQLite | 直接用 sql.js 内存数据库 `:memory:` |
   118→| 环境变量 | `vi.stubEnv()` |
   119→
   120→---
   121→
   122→## 目录结构
   123→
   124→```
   125→src/
   126→  types/
   127→    transcript.ts    # ParsedTranscript, Message, ToolEvent 接口
   128→  transcript/
   129→    common.ts        # 常量、工具函数、文本提取、去重
   130→    parse.ts         # 三客户端解析器 + infer_client
   131→    import.ts        # 导入、清洗、manifest
   132→    db.ts            # SQLite UPSERT 索引（非 FTS5）
   133→    discover.ts      # 文件发现、项目匹配
   134→    index.ts         # barrel re-export（仅导出公共 API）
   135→  heartbeat/
   136→    config.ts        # Config 类型 + TOML 加载/保存/项目注册
   137→    lock.ts          # PID 锁 + stale 检测
   138→    alert.ts         # alerts.json 管理 + 阈值
   139→    log.ts           # 日志（pino 或手写，按日轮转）
   140→    heartbeat.ts     # 主逻辑 + 敏感信息扫描
   141→  recall/
   142→    recall.ts        # 跨会话上下文恢复（P0.5 核心）
   143→  project/
   144→    scaffold.ts      # 目录初始化 + 模板渲染
   145→    locale.ts        # 项目语言检测
   146→    upgrade.ts       # 升级检测 + 执行
   147→  utils/
   148→    path.ts          # toPosixPath() 等路径工具
   149→    exec.ts          # subprocess 封装
   150→  cli/
   151→    main.ts          # 统一 CLI 入口
   152→    cmd-init.ts      # memorytree init
   153→    cmd-upgrade.ts   # memorytree upgrade
   154→    cmd-import.ts    # memorytree import
   155→    cmd-discover.ts  # memorytree discover
   156→    cmd-locale.ts    # memorytree locale
   157→    cmd-recall.ts    # memorytree recall
   158→    cmd-daemon.ts    # memorytree daemon install|uninstall|...
   159→tests/
   160→  fixtures/          # Python 生成的 golden file 输入/输出
   161→  transcript/
   162→    common.test.ts
   163→    parse-codex.test.ts
   164→    parse-claude.test.ts
   165→    parse-gemini.test.ts
   166→    import.test.ts
   167→    db.test.ts
   168→    discover.test.ts
   169→  heartbeat/
   170→    config.test.ts
   171→    lock.test.ts
   172→    alert.test.ts
   173→    log.test.ts
   174→    heartbeat.test.ts
   175→  recall/
   176→    recall.test.ts
   177→  project/
   178→    scaffold.test.ts
   179→    locale.test.ts
   180→    upgrade.test.ts
   181→  cli/
   182→    daemon.test.ts
   183→  integration/
   184→    e2e.test.ts
   185→```
   186→
   187→设计决策：
   188→- `utils/` 只放真正通用的工具（路径、subprocess）
   189→- `project/` 放业务级模块（scaffold、locale、upgrade），不归 `utils/`
   190→- `recall/` 独立目录，因为是 P0.5 核心功能，跨 transcript + heartbeat
   191→- `db.ts` 而非 `index.ts`，避免与 barrel 文件命名冲突
   192→- `types/transcript.ts` 放跨模块共享接口；`Config` 类型定义在 `heartbeat/config.ts` 内部（不跨模块共享）

   234→## Phase 1: 核心模块 — Transcript 处理
   235→
   236→> 对应 Python: `_transcript_common.py`(293L) + `_transcript_parse.py`(360L) + `_transcript_import.py`(213L) + `_transcript_index.py`(100L) + `_transcript_discover.py`(100L)

   238→### 1.1 类型定义 (`src/types/transcript.ts`)
   239→
   240→- [ ] **定义全部接口**（与 Python dataclass 1:1 映射）
   241→  ```ts
   242→  type Client = 'codex' | 'claude' | 'gemini'
   243→
   244→  interface TranscriptMessage {
   245→    role: string
   246→    text: string
   247→    timestamp: string | null
   248→  }
   249→
   250→  interface TranscriptToolEvent {
   251→    summary: string

   253→  }
   254→
   255→  interface ParsedTranscript {
   256→    client: Client
   257→    session_id: string

   269→

   292→### 1.2 通用工具 (`src/transcript/common.ts`)
   293→
   294→> 对应 `_transcript_common.py` (293L) — 22 个函数
   295→
   296→- [ ] **常量迁移**: `CLIENTS`, `TEXT_BLOCK_TYPES`, `SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES`, `TOOL_USE_TYPES`, `TOOL_RESULT_TYPES`
   297→- [ ] **基础工具函数**:
   298→  - `slugify(value, fallback)` — ASCII slug（注意 Python 用 `encode("ascii","ignore")` 丢弃非 ASCII，TS 需明确等价实现）
   299→  - `sha256File(path)` — 文件级 SHA-256 hex digest
   300→  - `contentHash(text)` — 16 字符 SHA-256 hex 前缀（`crypto.createHash('sha256')`）
   301→  - `normalizeTimestamp(value, fallback)` — 处理 unix epoch number / ISO string / Date 三种输入
   302→  - `earliestTimestamp(current, candidate)` — 返回较早者
   303→  - `parseIsoTimestamp(value)` — ISO 字符串 → Date | null
   304→  - `timestampPartition(timestamp)` — 提取 `[year, month]` 分区 token
   305→- [ ] **文本处理函数**:
   306→  - `joinParagraphs(parts)` — 双换行拼接
   307→  - `summarizeValue(value, limit)` — 截断显示
   308→  - `truncate(text, limit)` — 截断加 `...`
   309→  - `yamlEscape(value)` — YAML frontmatter 转义（clean markdown 需要）
   310→- [ ] **数据访问函数**:
   311→  - `ensureDict(value)`, `ensureList(value)`, `getNested(payload, ...keys)`
   312→  - `loadJsonl(path)`, `loadJson(path)`
   313→- [ ] **文本提取函数**（最复杂的逻辑）:
   314→  - `extractTextBlocks(blocks)` — typed content blocks
   315→  - `extractSimpleText(value)` — 递归 str/list/dict fallback
   316→  - `extractGeminiText(node)` — Gemini 格式节点
   317→  - `extractGeminiParts(value)` — Gemini parts 递归提取
   318→  - `findFirstMappingWithKeys(value, keys)` — DFS 查找第一个含指定 key 的 dict
   319→- [ ] **去重函数**:
   320→  - `deduplicateMessages(messages)` — 签名: `(timestamp, role, contentHash)`
   321→  - `deduplicateToolEvents(events)` — 签名: `(timestamp, contentHash)`
   322→- [ ] **测试**: 每个函数组 ≥ 3 case，去重边界情况（空、全重复、Unicode），用 golden file 验证 `contentHash` 与 Python `_content_hash` 一致
   323→

   359→### 1.4 导入与清洗 (`src/transcript/import.ts`)

   361→> 对应 `_transcript_import.py` (213L) — 9 个函数

   363→- [ ] **`importTranscript(parsed, root, globalRoot, projectSlug, rawUploadPermission, mirrorToRepo) → ManifestEntry`**

   442→### 2.2 锁文件 (`src/heartbeat/lock.ts`)
   443→
   444→> 对应 `_lock_utils.py` (103L) — 8 函数
   445→
   446→- [ ] **函数实现**:
   447→  - `lockPath()` → `~/.memorytree/heartbeat.lock`
   448→  - `acquireLock() → boolean` — 原子 `O_CREAT | O_EXCL` 写 PID
   449→  - `releaseLock()` — 删除锁文件

   452→    - Unix: `process.kill(pid, 0)` try/catch
   453→    - Windows: `child_process.execSync('tasklist /FI "PID eq ..."')` 检查
   454→  - Stale 检测: PID 进程不存在时自动回收

   473→

   485→### 2.5a 心跳主流程 (`src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts`)
   486→
   487→> 对应 `heartbeat.py` (224L) 的主流程部分 — 拆分为编排 + git
   488→
   489→- [ ] **`main() → number`**: 加载配置 → 获取锁 → `runHeartbeat()` → 释放锁
   490→- [ ] **`runHeartbeat(config) → number`**: 遍历注册项目，逐 project 调用 `processProject()`
   491→  - 单个 project 异常 try/catch 包裹，不中断整体
   492→- [ ] **`processProject(config, projectPath, projectName)`**:
   493→  - discover → parse → 过滤无内容 → `scanSensitive()` → import → gitCommitAndPush
   494→- [ ] **`scanSensitive(parsed, projectPath)`**:
   495→  - 5 条正则模式（直接从 Python `SENSITIVE_PATTERNS` 移植）
   496→  - 匹配时调用 `writeAlertWithThreshold()`
   497→  - 需用相同测试向量验证 TS `RegExp` 与 Python `re` 行为一致

   500→### 2.5b Git 操作 (`src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts` — git 部分)
   501→
   502→- [ ] **`gitCommitAndPush(config, projectPath, projectName, count)`**:
   503→  - `git status --porcelain Memory/` → 无变动跳过
   504→  - `git add Memory/` → `git commit` → 可选 `git push`
   505→  - remote 不存在时跳过 push 并记录日志
   506→- [ ] **`tryPush(projectPath, projectName) → boolean`**: 尝试 push，失败返回 false + 记录日志
   507→- [ ] **`git(cwd, ...args) → string`**: 统一 subprocess 封装
   508→  - 区分"允许失败"（status, remote）和"必须成功"（add, commit）
   509→- [ ] **测试**: git 各分支 mock（无变动/有变动/无 remote/push 失败）

   511→### 2.6 Daemon CLI (`src/cli/cmd-daemon.ts`)
   512→
   513→> 对应 `memorytree_daemon.py` (358L) — 19 函数
   514→
   515→- [ ] **5 个子命令**:
   516→  - `cmdInstall(args)` — 检测平台，注册 OS 调度任务
   517→  - `cmdUninstall()` — 移除调度任务
   518→  - `cmdRunOnce()` — 立即执行一次心跳
   519→  - `cmdWatch(args)` — 开发用循环模式
   520→  - `cmdStatus()` — 打印注册/锁/配置状态
   521→- [ ] **平台调度器 — Linux (cron)**:
   522→  - `installCron(heartbeatScript, seconds)` — 添加 cron 条目
   523→  - `uninstallCron()` — 过滤移除 memorytree 行
   524→  - `isCronRegistered() → boolean`
   525→  - 注册命令: `node /absolute/path/to/dist/cli.js daemon run-once`
   526→- [ ] **平台调度器 — macOS (launchd)**:
   527→  - `installLaunchd(heartbeatScript, seconds)` — 写 plist + launchctl load
   528→  - `uninstallLaunchd()` — launchctl unload + 删除 plist
   529→  - `isLaunchdRegistered() → boolean`
   530→- [ ] **平台调度器 — Windows (schtasks)**:
   531→  - `installSchtasks(heartbeatScript, seconds)` — 创建计划任务
   532→  - `uninstallSchtasks()` — 删除计划任务
   533→  - `isSchtasksRegistered() → boolean`
   534→- [ ] **辅助函数**:
   535→  - `heartbeatScriptPath()` — 返回 `dist/cli.js` 绝对路径（非 Python 的 `heartbeat.py`）
   536→  - `nodePath()` — 返回 `["node"]`（比 Python 的 `_python_path()` 简单）
   537→- [ ] **Python 调度任务迁移**:
   538→  - `cmdInstall` 前检测是否存在 Python 版调度任务（cron 中包含 `heartbeat.py`、schtasks 中包含 `python`）
   539→  - 存在则先 uninstall Python 版，再 install TS 版
   540→  - 输出提示告知用户已自动迁移
   541→- [ ] **测试**: install/uninstall 各平台分支 + run-once + status + Python 版迁移检测
   542→
   543→### 2.7 跨会话上下文恢复 (`src/recall/recall.ts`)
   544→
   545→> 对应 `recall-session.py` (296L) — v1 完全遗漏，P0.5 核心功能
   546→
   547→- [ ] **`syncCurrentProject(root, repoSlug, globalRoot) → number`**
   548→  - 按当前 repo 过滤的增量同步（非全量 discover）
   549→  - discover → parse → 过滤 `transcriptMatchesRepo` → import
   550→  - 返回导入数量
   551→- [ ] **`findLatestSession(globalRoot, root, repoSlug, activationTime) → SessionResult | null`**
   552→  - SQLite 查询: `WHERE started_at < activationTime ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 20`
   553→  - 在候选结果中做 `cwdMatches()` + `projectSlugsMatch()` 双重匹配
   554→- [ ] **`findLatestFromJsonl(globalRoot, root, repoSlug, activationTime) → SessionResult | null`**
   555→  - SQLite 不存在时的 JSONL fallback
   556→  - 逐行扫描 + 过滤 + 排序
   557→- [ ] **`cwdMatches(cwd, resolvedRoot) → boolean`**
   558→  - 精确匹配或子目录匹配（`startsWith(root + "/")`）
   559→- [ ] **输出格式**:
   560→  - JSON: `{ found, project, repo, imported_count, client, session_id, title, started_at, cwd, branch, message_count, tool_event_count, global_clean_path, clean_content }`
   561→  - Text: 行式 key-value + clean transcript 内容
   562→- [ ] **测试**: 有前次会话/无前次会话/SQLite fallback 到 JSONL/cwd 匹配逻辑
   563→
   564→---
   565→
   566→## Phase 3: 辅助模块
   567→
   568→> 对应 Python: `_scaffold_utils.py`(319L) + `_locale_utils.py`(123L) + `upgrade-memorytree.py`(306L) + `init-memorytree.py`(95L) + `detect-memorytree-locale.py`(42L)
   569→
   570→### 3.1 Scaffold (`src/project/scaffold.ts`)
   571→
   572→> 对应 `_scaffold_utils.py` (319L) — 1 dataclass + 13 函数
   573→
   574→- [ ] **ScaffoldPaths 接口**: root, goalDir, todoDir, chatDir, goalPath, todoPath, chatPath, goalVersion, todoVersion, previousVersion, dateLabel, timeLabel
   575→- [ ] **核心函数**:
   576→  - `resolveScaffoldPaths(root, dt) → ScaffoldPaths` — 计算所有路径和版本号
   577→  - `createMemoryDirs(root) → string[]` — 创建 5 个标准 Memory/ 子目录
   578→  - `scaffoldContentFiles(paths, templates, goalSummary, projectName, force) → { created, preserved }`
   579→- [ ] **模板处理**:
   580→  - `resolveTemplateDir(skillRoot, root, localeValue) → string` — 定位 `assets/templates/<locale>/`
   581→  - `writeTemplate(templatePath, targetPath, force, values)` — 占位符替换渲染
   582→  - 注意：`assets/templates/` 是静态资产，打包时需要包含（tsup `copy` 或运行时相对路径解析）
   583→- [ ] **版本检测**: `findLatestVersion()`, `findLatestGoalFile()`, `findLatestTodoVersion()`, `findLatestChatLogFile()`
   584→- [ ] **策略文件检测**: `findExternalPolicySources()`, `hasPolicyContent()`
   585→- [ ] **测试**: 初始化全流程 + 已存在时幂等 + 模板渲染
   586→
   587→### 3.2 Locale (`src/project/locale.ts`)
   588→
   589→> 对应 `_locale_utils.py` (123L)
   590→
   591→- [ ] **`detectLocale(projectDir) → string`** — 正则匹配 + 评分
   592→- [ ] **CLI 输出格式**: `{ requested, repo_locale, system_locale, effective_locale }` JSON 四字段（API 合同）
   593→- [ ] **测试**: 中文项目、英文项目、混合项目
   594→
   595→### 3.3 升级检测 (`src/project/upgrade.ts`)
   596→
   597→> 对应 `upgrade-memorytree.py` (306L) — 15 函数
   598→
   599→- [ ] **`detectState(root) → 'not-installed' | 'partial' | 'installed'`**
   600→- [ ] **`checkUpgrade(root) → UpgradeAction[]`** — 检测缺失的目录/文件
   601→- [ ] **AGENTS.md 完整性检测** — 9 个 signal 检测函数:
   602→  - `hasReadOrderSignal()`, `hasMemoryLayoutSignal()`, `hasActiveTodoRule()`, `hasAppendOnlyChatLogRule()`, `hasRepoSafetyRule()`, `hasCommitTitleRule()`, `hasDedicatedMemoryTreePRFlow()`, `hasMemoryTreeOnlyScopeRule()`, `hasAutoMergeRule()`
   603→- [ ] **测试**: not-installed / partial / installed 三种状态
   604→
   605→---
   606→
   607→## Phase 4: CLI 统一 + 清理 + 分发
   608→
   609→> 目标: 所有散落 Python 脚本合并为 `memorytree <subcommand>`, 删除 Python 代码
   610→
   611→### 4.1 CLI 子命令实现
   612→
   613→每个 CLI wrapper 负责参数解析 + 调用 library 层 + 格式化输出。
   614→
   615→- [ ] **`cmd-init.ts`** (← `init-memorytree.py` 95L)
   616→  - 参数: `--root`, `--project-name`, `--goal-summary`, `--locale`, `--date`, `--time`, `--skip-agents`, `--force`
   617→- [ ] **`cmd-upgrade.ts`** (← `upgrade-memorytree.py` 306L)
   618→  - 参数: `--root`, `--locale`, `--dry-run`
   619→- [ ] **`cmd-import.ts`** (← `import-transcripts.py` 117L)
   620→  - 参数: `--root`, `--client`, `--scope` (current-project|all-projects), `--project-name`, `--global-root`, `--raw-upload-permission` (not-set|approved|denied), `--limit`, `--format`
   621→  - 输出: `{ imports, skipped, imported_count, skipped_count, ... }` 结构化 JSON
   622→  - `summarizeException()` 辅助函数
   623→- [ ] **`cmd-discover.ts`** (← `discover-transcripts.py` 194L)
   624→  - 与 cmd-import 共享大部分参数
   625→  - `--scope`, `--limit`, `--client` 过滤逻辑
   626→  - JSON 输出包含 `imports` + `skipped` 数组
   627→- [ ] **`cmd-locale.ts`** (← `detect-memorytree-locale.py` 42L)
   628→  - `--format json` 输出四字段 JSON
   629→- [ ] **`cmd-recall.ts`** (← `recall-session.py` 296L)
   630→  - 参数: `--root`, `--project-name`, `--global-root`, `--activation-time`, `--format`
   631→- [ ] **`cmd-daemon.ts`** — 已在 Phase 2.6 实现
   632→- [ ] **`main.ts` 统一入口**: commander 注册所有子命令
   633→  - `memorytree init|upgrade|import|discover|locale|recall|daemon`
   634→
   635→### 4.2 更新 SKILL.md
   636→
   637→- [ ] **替换所有 `scripts/*.py` 路径引用**（共 8 处）:
   638→  - `scripts/init-memorytree.py` → `memorytree init` 或 `node dist/cli.js init`
   639→  - `scripts/upgrade-memorytree.py` → `memorytree upgrade`
   640→  - `scripts/heartbeat.py` → `memorytree daemon run-once`
   641→  - `scripts/memorytree_daemon.py` → `memorytree daemon`
   642→  - `scripts/recall-session.py` → `memorytree recall`
   643→  - `scripts/detect-memorytree-locale.py` → `memorytree locale`
   644→  - `scripts/discover-transcripts.py` → `memorytree discover`
   645→  - `scripts/import-transcripts.py` → `memorytree import`
   646→- [ ] **重写 `references/execution-environment.md`**
   647→  - 从"如何找 uv/python 运行时的三级回退链"改为"Node.js 运行时检测"
   648→  - Claude Code 用户: Node.js 已存在，直接运行
   649→  - 非 Claude Code 用户: 检查 `node --version` ≥ 20
   650→  - 回退: 提示安装 Node.js
   651→
   652→### 4.3 更新 P2 职责最小化 (TODO.md)
   653→
   654→- [ ] **更新 SKILL.md On Activation 段**: 明确大模型 vs heartbeat 职责边界
   655→- [ ] **添加定时任务状态检测**: On Activation 时检测 `memorytree daemon status`，读取 `alerts.json` 展示
   656→
   657→### 4.4 清理 Python
   658→
   659→- [ ] **删除 Python 源码**: `scripts/*.py`, `scripts/__pycache__/`
   660→- [ ] **删除 Python 测试**: `tests/*.py`, `tests/__pycache__/`
   661→- [ ] **删除 Python 配置**: `.coverage`
   662→- [ ] **更新 CI**: 移除 `test-python` job，只保留 `test-typescript`
   663→- [ ] **更新 `agents/` 目录**: 检查 `openai.yaml` 中是否引用 Python 脚本路径，如有则更新
   664→- [ ] **更新 README.md**: 技术栈说明改为 TypeScript
   665→- [ ] **更新 TODO.md**: 反映 TS 技术路线，P3 分发从 pip → npm
   666→
   667→### 4.5 分发准备
   668→
   669→- [ ] **package.json `bin` 字段**: `memorytree` → `./dist/cli.js`
   670→- [ ] **`npm pack` 验证**: 确认包含 `dist/`, `assets/templates/`, 不含 `src/`, `tests/`, `scripts/`
   671→- [ ] **npx 可用性**: `npx memorytree-workflow init --root .` 零安装可运行
   672→- [ ] **版本号**: Phase 4 完成后升至 `1.0.0`
   673→
   674→---
   675→
   676→## 迁移检查清单
   677→
   678→每个 Phase 完成后核对:
   679→
   680→- [ ] 所有测试通过 (`npm test`)
   681→- [ ] 覆盖率 ≥ 80% (`vitest --coverage`)
   682→- [ ] 无 TypeScript 编译错误 (`tsc --noEmit`)
   683→- [ ] ESLint 无错误 (`npm run lint`)
   684→- [ ] Golden file 对比通过（TS 输出与 Python 输出字节级一致）
   685→- [ ] CI 流水线绿色（Node.js 20/22 × 3 OS）
   686→- [ ] Windows 路径全部 posix 格式（grep 检查无反斜杠写入文件）
   687→
   688→---
   689→
   690→## 风险与应对
   691→
   692→| 风险 | 概率 | 影响 | 应对 |
   693→|------|------|------|------|
   694→| sql.js 异步 API 导致调用链重构 | 确定 | 中 | 所有 db 操作标记 async，影响可控 |
   695→| `normalizeTimestamp` 时区/精度差异 | 中 | 数据不一致 | Golden file 覆盖所有输入格式 |
   696→| `slugify` 非 ASCII 处理差异 | 中 | 路径不一致 | 用相同中日韩测试向量验证 |
   697→| 迁移期间两套代码并存的维护成本 | 中 | 效率下降 | 按 Phase 快速推进，Python 只维护不新增 |
   698→| 已有 Python 版 cron 任务需迁移 | 高 | 用户困惑 | Phase 2.6 自动检测并替换 |
   699→| `assets/templates/` 打包策略 | 低 | scaffold 失败 | tsup `copy` 或运行时 `__dirname` 相对路径 |
   700→| AI/NLP 后续需求需要 Python | 低 | 架构调整 | TS API 层 + Python 微服务 |
   701→
   702→---
   703→
   704→## 执行顺序与依赖
   705→
   706→```
   707→Phase 0 (骨架 + 工程规范 + golden file)
   708→    ↓
   709→Phase 1 (transcript 核心)  ← 最大工作量，约 40%
   710→    ↓
   711→Phase 2 (heartbeat + daemon + recall)  ← 依赖 Phase 1 的 discover/import/db
   712→    ↓
   713→Phase 3 (scaffold + locale + upgrade)  ← 可与 Phase 2 部分并行
   714→    ↓
   715→Phase 4 (CLI 统一 + SKILL.md 更新 + 清理 + 分发)  ← 迁移完成
   716→```
   717→
   718→Phase 内的子任务可并行（如 1.3a/1.3b/1.3c 三个解析器），但 Phase 之间有硬依赖：
   719→- Phase 1.4 (import) 依赖 1.5 (db) 的 `upsertSearchIndex`
   720→- Phase 2.5 (heartbeat) 依赖 1.6 (discover) + 1.4 (import)
   721→- Phase 2.7 (recall) 依赖 1.6 (discover) + 1.4 (import) + 1.5 (db)
   722→- Phase 4.1 (CLI) 依赖 Phase 1-3 全部 library 层完成
   723→
   724→---
   725→
   726→## 与原 TODO.md 的对应关系
   727→
   728→| 原 TODO 条目 | 迁移计划对应 |
   729→|-------------|-------------|
   730→| P0 heartbeat (代码完成) | Phase 2.1-2.6，1:1 TS 重写 |
   731→| P0 首次安装触发 | Phase 2.6 `cmdInstall` + P4.3 On Activation |
   732→| P0.5 跨会话上下文恢复 | **Phase 2.7** (v1 遗漏，v2 补齐) |
   733→| P1 模块拆分 | Phase 1 天然按模块组织 |
   734→| P1 去重 | Phase 1.2 `deduplicateMessages/ToolEvents` |
   735→| P1 CI 流水线 | Phase 0 CI 更新 |
   736→| P1 集成测试 | Phase 1.7 + 各模块测试 |
   737→| P2 职责最小化 | **Phase 4.3** (v1 遗漏，v2 补齐) |
   738→| P3 分发打包 | Phase 4.5，pip → npm |
   739→| P3 跨平台路径 | 工程规范 `toPosixPath()` |
   740→| 跨客户端兼容性原则 | 不变，TS 不影响此原则 |

Perfect! Now let me create a comprehensive summary document based on all the information I've gathered.

## TypeScript Project Structure Exploration — Comprehensive Report

### 1. PROJECT OVERVIEW

**memorytree-workflow** is a Phase 0 scaffold TypeScript project that will eventually be a complete rewrite of the Python MemoryTree Skill. It provides transcript import, dedup, indexing, and session continuity for AI coding assistants (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI).

**Current Status:** Phase 0 complete (skeleton scaffolded)
**Target Node.js:** 20+ (LTS) 
**Type Safety:** TypeScript 5.7 with strict mode enabled

---

### 2. PACKAGE.JSON CONFIGURATION

**File:** `D:\demo1\memorytree-workflow\package.json`

```json
{
  "name": "memorytree-workflow",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "type": "module",              // ESM only
  "engines": { "node": ">=20" }
  "scripts": {
    "build": "tsup",
    "dev": "tsx src/cli/main.ts",
    "test": "vitest run",
    "lint": "eslint src tests --ext .ts",
    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit"
  }
}
```

**Key Dependencies:**
- `commander@^13.1.0` — CLI framework
- `sql.js@^1.12.0` — SQLite via WASM (zero native dependencies)
- `smol-toml@^1.3.1` — TOML parsing
- `@iarna/toml@^2.2.5` — TOML serialization

**Dev Dependencies:**
- `typescript@^5.7.3` — strict mode compiler
- `tsx@^4.19.3` — TypeScript executor (dev only)
- `tsup@^8.4.0` — bundler for production
- `vitest@^3.1.1` — test runner (globals enabled)
- `@types/node@^22.13.10` — Node.js type definitions
- `eslint@^8.57.1` + `@typescript-eslint/*@^7.18.0` — linting
- `memfs@^4.17.0` — in-memory filesystem for testing

**Bin Entries:**
```json
"bin": {
  "memorytree": "./dist/cli.js",
  "memorytree-daemon": "./dist/cli.js"
}
```
Both point to the same compiled CLI entry point.

---

### 3. TYPESCRIPT CONFIGURATION (tsconfig.json)

**File:** `D:\demo1\memorytree-workflow\tsconfig.json`

**Key Settings:**
- **Target:** `ES2022` (modern JavaScript features)
- **Module:** `NodeNext` (requires `.js` extensions in imports)

"""Transcript parsing — dataclasses, client inference, and format-specific parsers."""

from __future__ import annotations

import json
from dataclasses import dataclass
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

from _transcript_common import *  # noqa: F401,F403
from _transcript_common import (
    SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES,
    TEXT_BLOCK_TYPES,
    TOOL_RESULT_TYPES,
    TOOL_USE_TYPES,
    deduplicate_messages,
    deduplicate_tool_events,
    earliest_timestamp,
    ensure_dict,
    ensure_list,
    extract_gemini_text,
    extract_text_blocks,
    find_first_mapping_with_keys,
    get_nested,
    join_paragraphs,
    load_jsonl,
    normalize_timestamp,
    summarize_value,
)


@dataclass
class TranscriptMessage:
    role: str
    text: str
    timestamp: str | None = None


@dataclass
class TranscriptToolEvent:
    summary: str
    timestamp: str | None = None


@dataclass
class ParsedTranscript:
    client: str
    session_id: str
    title: str
    started_at: str
    cwd: str
    branch: str
    messages: list[TranscriptMessage]
    tool_events: list[TranscriptToolEvent]
    source_path: Path


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Client inference + dispatch
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


def infer_client(client: str, source: Path) -> str:
    if client != "auto":
        return client
    normalized = source.as_posix().lower()
    if "/.codex/" in normalized or "rollout-" in source.name.lower():
        return "codex"
    if "/.claude/" in normalized or "/projects/" in normalized:
        return "claude"
    if "/.gemini/" in normalized or "checkpoint" in normalized:
        return "gemini"
    raise SystemExit(f"could not infer transcript client from source path: {source}")


def parse_transcript(client: str, source: Path) -> ParsedTranscript:
    if client == "codex":
        return parse_codex_transcript(source)
    if client == "claude":
        return parse_claude_transcript(source)
    if client == "gemini":
        return parse_gemini_transcript(source)
    raise SystemExit(f"unsupported transcript client: {client}")


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Codex parser
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


def parse_codex_transcript(path: Path) -> ParsedTranscript:
    records = load_jsonl(path)
    session_id = path.stem
    title = path.stem
    started_at = normalize_timestamp(path.stat().st_mtime)
    cwd = ""
    branch = ""
    messages: list[TranscriptMessage] = []
    tool_events: list[TranscriptToolEvent] = []

    for record in records:
        record_type = str(record.get("type") or "")
        timestamp = normalize_timestamp(record.get("timestamp"), started_at)
        if record_type == "session_meta":
            payload = ensure_dict(record.get("payload"))
            session_id = str(payload.get("id") or session_id)
            title = str(payload.get("thread_name") or payload.get("title") or title)
            started_at = earliest_timestamp(started_at, payload.get("timestamp"))
            cwd = str(payload.get("cwd") or cwd)
            branch = str(get_nested(payload, "git", "branch") or branch)
            continue

        if record_type not in {"response_item", "event_msg"}:
            continue

        payload = ensure_dict(record.get("payload"))
        payload_type = str(payload.get("type") or "")
        if payload_type == "message":
            role = str(payload.get("role") or "").lower()
            if role in {"user", "assistant"}:
                text = extract_text_blocks(payload.get("content"))
                if text:
                    messages.append(TranscriptMessage(role=role, text=text, timestamp=timestamp))
            continue

        if payload_type in {"user_message", "agent_message"}:
            role = "user" if payload_type == "user_message" else "assistant"
            text = str(payload.get("message") or "").strip()
            if text:
                messages.append(TranscriptMessage(role=role, text=text, timestamp=timestamp))
            continue

        if payload_type == "function_call":
            name = str(payload.get("name") or "function_call")
            arguments = payload.get("arguments") or payload.get("input")
            tool_events.append(
                TranscriptToolEvent(
                    summary=f"{name} input={summarize_value(arguments)}",
                    timestamp=timestamp,
                )
            )
            continue

        if payload_type == "custom_tool_call":
            name = str(payload.get("name") or payload.get("call_id") or "custom_tool_call")
            tool_events.append(
                TranscriptToolEvent(
                    summary=f"{name} input={summarize_value(payload.get('input'))}",
                    timestamp=timestamp,
                )
            )
            continue

        if payload_type == "function_call_output":
            name = str(payload.get("name") or payload.get("call_id") or "function_call_output")
            output = payload.get("output") or payload.get("content")
            tool_events.append(
                TranscriptToolEvent(
                    summary=f"{name} output={summarize_value(output)}",
                    timestamp=timestamp,
                )
            )
            continue

        if payload_type == "custom_tool_call_output":
            name = str(payload.get("name") or payload.get("call_id") or "custom_tool_call_output")
            output = payload.get("output") or payload.get("content")
            tool_events.append(
                TranscriptToolEvent(
                    summary=f"{name} output={summarize_value(output)}",
                    timestamp=timestamp,
                )
            )

    messages = deduplicate_messages(messages)
    tool_events = deduplicate_tool_events(tool_events)

    return ParsedTranscript(
        client="codex",
        session_id=session_id,
        title=title,
        started_at=started_at,
        cwd=cwd,
        branch=branch,
        messages=messages,
        tool_events=tool_events,
        source_path=path,
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Claude parser
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


def parse_claude_transcript(path: Path) -> ParsedTranscript:
    records = load_jsonl(path)
    session_id = path.stem
    title = path.stem
    started_at = normalize_timestamp(path.stat().st_mtime)
    cwd = ""
    branch = ""
    messages: list[TranscriptMessage] = []
    tool_events: list[TranscriptToolEvent] = []

    for record in records:
        record_type = str(record.get("type") or "")
        timestamp = normalize_timestamp(record.get("timestamp"), started_at)
        session_id = str(record.get("sessionId") or session_id)
        started_at = earliest_timestamp(started_at, record.get("timestamp"))
        cwd = str(record.get("cwd") or cwd)
        branch = str(record.get("gitBranch") or branch)

        if record_type not in {"user", "assistant"}:
            continue

        message = ensure_dict(record.get("message"))
        role = str(message.get("role") or record_type).lower()
        text_parts: list[str] = []
        content = message.get("content")
        if isinstance(content, str):
            text = content.strip()
            if role in {"user", "assistant"} and text:
                messages.append(TranscriptMessage(role=role, text=text, timestamp=timestamp))
            continue

        for block in ensure_list(content):
            if isinstance(block, str):
                if block.strip():
                    text_parts.append(block.strip())
                continue
            if not isinstance(block, dict):
                continue
            block_type = str(block.get("type") or "").lower()
            if block_type in TEXT_BLOCK_TYPES:
                text = str(block.get("text") or "").strip()
                if text:
                    text_parts.append(text)
                continue
            if block_type in SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES:
                continue
            if block_type in TOOL_USE_TYPES:
                name = str(block.get("name") or "tool_use")
                tool_events.append(
                    TranscriptToolEvent(
                        summary=f"{name} input={summarize_value(block.get('input'))}",
                        timestamp=timestamp,
                    )
                )
                continue
            if block_type in TOOL_RESULT_TYPES:
                tool_use_id = str(block.get("tool_use_id") or "tool_result")
                tool_events.append(
                    TranscriptToolEvent(
                        summary=f"{tool_use_id} output={summarize_value(block.get('content'))}",
                        timestamp=timestamp,
                    )
                )

        text = join_paragraphs(text_parts)
        if role in {"user", "assistant"} and text:
            messages.append(TranscriptMessage(role=role, text=text, timestamp=timestamp))

    messages = deduplicate_messages(messages)
    tool_events = deduplicate_tool_events(tool_events)

    return ParsedTranscript(
        client="claude",
        session_id=session_id,
        title=title,
        started_at=started_at,
        cwd=cwd,
        branch=branch,
        messages=messages,
        tool_events=tool_events,
        source_path=path,
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Gemini parser
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


def parse_gemini_transcript(path: Path) -> ParsedTranscript:
    session_id = path.stem
    title = path.stem
    started_at = normalize_timestamp(path.stat().st_mtime)
    cwd = ""
    branch = ""
    messages: list[TranscriptMessage] = []
    tool_events: list[TranscriptToolEvent] = []

    if path.suffix.lower() == ".jsonl":
        payload: Any = load_jsonl(path)
    else:
        payload = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

    first_meta = find_first_mapping_with_keys(payload, {"sessionId", "chatId", "cwd", "branch", "timestamp"})
    if first_meta:
        session_id = str(first_meta.get("sessionId") or first_meta.get("chatId") or first_meta.get("id") or session_id)
        started_at = earliest_timestamp(started_at, first_meta.get("timestamp"))
        cwd = str(first_meta.get("cwd") or first_meta.get("projectRoot") or cwd)
        branch = str(first_meta.get("branch") or branch)

    def visit(node: Any) -> None:
        nonlocal session_id, started_at, cwd, branch
        if isinstance(node, list):
            for item in node:
                visit(item)
            return
        if not isinstance(node, dict):
            return

        session_id = str(node.get("sessionId") or node.get("chatId") or node.get("id") or session_id)
        started_at = earliest_timestamp(started_at, node.get("timestamp"))
        cwd = str(node.get("cwd") or node.get("projectRoot") or cwd)
        branch = str(node.get("branch") or branch)

        role = str(node.get("role") or node.get("author") or node.get("sender") or "").lower()
        timestamp = normalize_timestamp(node.get("timestamp"), started_at)
        if role in {"user", "assistant", "model"}:
            normalized_role = "assistant" if role == "model" else role
            text = extract_gemini_text(node)
            if text:
                messages.append(TranscriptMessage(role=normalized_role, text=text, timestamp=timestamp))

        tool_name = (
            get_nested(node, "toolUse", "name")
            or node.get("toolName")
            or node.get("functionName")
            or node.get("tool")
        )
        if tool_name:
            tool_events.append(
                TranscriptToolEvent(
                    summary=f"{tool_name} input={summarize_value(node.get('args') or node.get('input'))}",
                    timestamp=timestamp,
                )
            )

        for value in node.values():
            visit(value)

    visit(payload)

    messages = deduplicate_messages(messages)
    tool_events = deduplicate_tool_events(tool_events)

    return ParsedTranscript(
        client="gemini",
        session_id=session_id,
        title=title,
        started_at=started_at,
        cwd=cwd,
        branch=branch,
        messages=messages,
        tool_events=tool_events,
        source_path=path,
    )

"""Transcript search index — SQLite upsert for the global transcript catalog."""

from __future__ import annotations

import sqlite3
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any


def upsert_search_index(db_path: Path, manifest: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
    conn = sqlite3.connect(db_path)
    try:
        conn.execute("PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL")
        conn.execute(
            """
            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS transcripts (
                client TEXT NOT NULL,
                project TEXT NOT NULL,
                session_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                raw_sha256 TEXT NOT NULL,
                title TEXT NOT NULL,
                started_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                imported_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                cwd TEXT NOT NULL,
                branch TEXT NOT NULL,
                raw_source_path TEXT NOT NULL,
                raw_upload_permission TEXT NOT NULL,
                global_raw_path TEXT NOT NULL,
                global_clean_path TEXT NOT NULL,
                repo_raw_path TEXT NOT NULL,
                repo_clean_path TEXT NOT NULL,
                repo_manifest_path TEXT NOT NULL,
                message_count INTEGER NOT NULL,
                tool_event_count INTEGER NOT NULL,
                PRIMARY KEY (client, project, session_id, raw_sha256)
            )
            """
        )
        conn.execute(
            """
            INSERT INTO transcripts (
                client,
                project,
                session_id,
                raw_sha256,
                title,
                started_at,
                imported_at,
                cwd,
                branch,
                raw_source_path,
                raw_upload_permission,
                global_raw_path,
                global_clean_path,
                repo_raw_path,
                repo_clean_path,
                repo_manifest_path,
                message_count,
                tool_event_count
            ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
            ON CONFLICT(client, project, session_id, raw_sha256) DO UPDATE SET
                title = excluded.title,
                started_at = excluded.started_at,
                imported_at = excluded.imported_at,
                cwd = excluded.cwd,
                branch = excluded.branch,
                raw_source_path = excluded.raw_source_path,
                raw_upload_permission = excluded.raw_upload_permission,
                global_raw_path = excluded.global_raw_path,
                global_clean_path = excluded.global_clean_path,
                repo_raw_path = excluded.repo_raw_path,
                repo_clean_path = excluded.repo_clean_path,
                repo_manifest_path = excluded.repo_manifest_path,
                message_count = excluded.message_count,
                tool_event_count = excluded.tool_event_count
            """,
            (
                manifest["client"],
                manifest["project"],
                manifest["session_id"],
                manifest["raw_sha256"],
                manifest["title"],
                manifest["started_at"],
                manifest["imported_at"],
                manifest["cwd"],
                manifest["branch"],
                manifest["raw_source_path"],
                manifest["raw_upload_permission"],
                manifest["global_raw_path"],
                manifest["global_clean_path"],
                manifest["repo_raw_path"],
                manifest["repo_clean_path"],
                manifest["repo_manifest_path"],
                manifest["message_count"],
                manifest["tool_event_count"],
            ),
        )
        conn.commit()
    finally:
        conn.close()

   132→        f"- Client: `{manifest['client']}`",
   133→        f"- Project: `{manifest['project']}`",
   134→        f"- Session ID: `{manifest['session_id']}`",
   135→        f"- Started At: `{manifest['started_at']}`",
   136→        f"- Imported At: `{manifest['imported_at']}`",
   137→        f"- Raw SHA256: `{manifest['raw_sha256']}`",
   138→        f"- Raw Source: `{manifest['raw_source_path']}`",
   139→        f"- Repo Raw Path: `{manifest['repo_raw_path']}`",
   140→        f"- Repo Clean Path: `{manifest['repo_clean_path']}`",

   143→    ]

   147→            lines.extend(
   148→                [

   151→                    "",
   152→                    message.text,
   153→                    "",
   154→                ]
   155→            )
   156→    else:
   157→        lines.extend(
   158→            [
   159→                "No user or assistant messages were extracted deterministically from the source transcript.",
   160→                "",
   161→            ]
   162→        )
   163→
   164→    lines.append("## Tool Events")
   165→    if parsed.tool_events:
   166→        for event in parsed.tool_events:
   167→            lines.append(f"- `{event.timestamp or manifest['started_at']}` {event.summary}")
   168→    else:
   169→        lines.append("- No tool events were extracted.")
   170→    lines.append("")
   171→
   172→    path.write_text("\n".join(lines), encoding="utf-8")
   173→
   174→
   175→def preserve_existing_import_timestamp(existing: dict[str, Any] | None, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
   176→    if existing is None:
   177→        return payload
   178→    if manifest_signature(existing) != manifest_signature(payload):
   179→        return payload
   180→    preserved = dict(payload)
   181→    imported_at = existing.get("imported_at")
   182→    if isinstance(imported_at, str) and imported_at:
   183→        preserved["imported_at"] = imported_at
   184→    return preserved
   185→
   186→
   187→def manifest_signature(payload: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
   188→    return {key: value for key, value in payload.items() if key != "imported_at"}
   189→
   190→
   191→def manifest_changed(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> bool:
   192→    if not path.exists():
   193→        return True
   194→    try:
   195→        current = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
   196→    except (OSError, json.JSONDecodeError):
   197→        return True
   198→    return current != payload
   199→
   200→
   201→def write_json(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
   202→    path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
   203→
   204→
   205→def append_jsonl(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
   206→    with path.open("a", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
   207→        handle.write(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n")
   208→
   209→
   210→def copy_file(source: Path, destination: Path) -> None:
   211→    if source.resolve() == destination.resolve():
   212→        return
   213→    shutil.copy2(source, destination)

"""Transcript import — orchestration, cleaning, and manifest management."""

from __future__ import annotations

import json
import shutil
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

from _transcript_common import (
    load_json,
    normalize_timestamp,
    sha256_file,
    slugify,
    timestamp_partition,
    yaml_escape,
)
from _transcript_index import upsert_search_index
from _transcript_parse import ParsedTranscript


def import_transcript(
    parsed: ParsedTranscript,
    root: Path,
    global_root: Path,
    project_slug: str,
    raw_upload_permission: str,
    mirror_to_repo: bool = True,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    imported_at = normalize_timestamp(datetime.now(timezone.utc))
    raw_sha256 = sha256_file(parsed.source_path)
    session_label = slugify(parsed.session_id, fallback=slugify(parsed.source_path.stem, fallback="session"))
    artifact_stem = f"{session_label}__{raw_sha256[:8]}"
    source_suffix = parsed.source_path.suffix or ".txt"

    year_token, month_token = timestamp_partition(parsed.started_at or imported_at)

    repo_root = root / "Memory" / "06_transcripts"
    repo_raw_path = repo_root / "raw" / parsed.client / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}{source_suffix}"
    repo_clean_path = repo_root / "clean" / parsed.client / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}.md"
    repo_manifest_path = repo_root / "manifests" / parsed.client / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}.json"

    global_raw_path = global_root / "raw" / parsed.client / project_slug / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}{source_suffix}"
    global_clean_path = global_root / "clean" / parsed.client / project_slug / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}.md"
    global_manifest_path = global_root / "index" / "manifests" / parsed.client / project_slug / year_token / month_token / f"{artifact_stem}.json"
    global_event_log_path = global_root / "index" / "sessions.jsonl"
    global_db_path = global_root / "index" / "search.sqlite"

    for path in (
        global_raw_path,
        global_clean_path,
        global_manifest_path,
        global_event_log_path,
        global_db_path,
    ):
        path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    if mirror_to_repo:
        for path in (repo_raw_path, repo_clean_path, repo_manifest_path):
            path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    if mirror_to_repo:
        copy_file(parsed.source_path, repo_raw_path)
    copy_file(parsed.source_path, global_raw_path)

    manifest = {
        "client": parsed.client,
        "project": project_slug,
        "session_id": parsed.session_id,
        "title": parsed.title,
        "started_at": parsed.started_at,
        "imported_at": imported_at,
        "cwd": parsed.cwd,
        "branch": parsed.branch,
        "raw_source_path": parsed.source_path.as_posix(),
        "raw_sha256": raw_sha256,
        "raw_upload_permission": raw_upload_permission,
        "repo_raw_path": repo_raw_path.relative_to(root).as_posix() if mirror_to_repo else "",
        "repo_clean_path": repo_clean_path.relative_to(root).as_posix() if mirror_to_repo else "",
        "repo_manifest_path": repo_manifest_path.relative_to(root).as_posix() if mirror_to_repo else "",
        "global_raw_path": global_raw_path.as_posix(),
        "global_clean_path": global_clean_path.as_posix(),
        "global_manifest_path": global_manifest_path.as_posix(),
        "message_count": len(parsed.messages),
        "tool_event_count": len(parsed.tool_events),
        "cleaning_mode": "deterministic-code",
        "repo_mirror_enabled": mirror_to_repo,
    }
    existing_global_manifest = load_json(global_manifest_path)
    manifest = preserve_existing_import_timestamp(existing_global_manifest, manifest)

    if mirror_to_repo:
        write_clean_markdown(parsed, manifest, repo_clean_path)
    write_clean_markdown(parsed, manifest, global_clean_path)
    if mirror_to_repo:
        write_json(repo_manifest_path, manifest)
    append_to_event_log = existing_global_manifest is None or existing_global_manifest != manifest
    write_json(global_manifest_path, manifest)
    if append_to_event_log:
        append_jsonl(global_event_log_path, manifest)
    upsert_search_index(global_db_path, manifest)

    result = dict(manifest)
    result["global_index_db"] = global_db_path.as_posix()
    return result


def transcript_has_content(parsed: ParsedTranscript) -> bool:
    return bool(parsed.messages or parsed.tool_events)


def write_clean_markdown(parsed: ParsedTranscript, manifest: dict[str, Any], path: Path) -> None:
    lines = [
        "---",
        f"client: {manifest['client']}",
        f"project: {manifest['project']}",
        f"session_id: {manifest['session_id']}",
        f"title: {yaml_escape(manifest['title'])}",
        f"started_at: {manifest['started_at']}",
        f"imported_at: {manifest['imported_at']}",
        f"cwd: {yaml_escape(manifest['cwd'])}",
        f"branch: {yaml_escape(manifest['branch'])}",
        f"raw_source_path: {yaml_escape(manifest['raw_source_path'])}",
        f"raw_sha256: {manifest['raw_sha256']}",
        f"raw_upload_permission: {manifest['raw_upload_permission']}",
        f"cleaning_mode: {manifest['cleaning_mode']}",
        "---",
        "",
        f"# {manifest['title'] or manifest['session_id']}",
        "",
        "## Metadata",
        f"- Client: `{manifest['client']}`",
        f"- Project: `{manifest['project']}`",
        f"- Session ID: `{manifest['session_id']}`",
        f"- Started At: `{manifest['started_at']}`",
        f"- Imported At: `{manifest['imported_at']}`",
        f"- Raw SHA256: `{manifest['raw_sha256']}`",
        f"- Raw Source: `{manifest['raw_source_path']}`",
        f"- Repo Raw Path: `{manifest['repo_raw_path']}`",
        f"- Repo Clean Path: `{manifest['repo_clean_path']}`",
        "",
        "## Messages",
    ]

    if parsed.messages:
        for index, message in enumerate(parsed.messages, start=1):
            lines.extend(
                [
                    f"### {index}. {message.role}",
                    f"- Timestamp: `{message.timestamp or manifest['started_at']}`",
                    "",
                    message.text,
                    "",
                ]
            )
    else:
        lines.extend(
            [
                "No user or assistant messages were extracted deterministically from the source transcript.",
                "",
            ]
        )

    lines.append("## Tool Events")
    if parsed.tool_events:
        for event in parsed.tool_events:
            lines.append(f"- `{event.timestamp or manifest['started_at']}` {event.summary}")
    else:
        lines.append("- No tool events were extracted.")
    lines.append("")

    path.write_text("\n".join(lines), encoding="utf-8")


def preserve_existing_import_timestamp(existing: dict[str, Any] | None, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
    if existing is None:
        return payload
    if manifest_signature(existing) != manifest_signature(payload):
        return payload
    preserved = dict(payload)
    imported_at = existing.get("imported_at")
    if isinstance(imported_at, str) and imported_at:
        preserved["imported_at"] = imported_at
    return preserved


def manifest_signature(payload: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
    return {key: value for key, value in payload.items() if key != "imported_at"}


def manifest_changed(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> bool:
    if not path.exists():
        return True
    try:
        current = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    except (OSError, json.JSONDecodeError):
        return True
    return current != payload


def write_json(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
    path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")


def append_jsonl(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
    with path.open("a", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
        handle.write(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n")


def copy_file(source: Path, destination: Path) -> None:
    if source.resolve() == destination.resolve():
        return
    shutil.copy2(source, destination)

1→"""Transcript discovery — file scanning and project matching."""
     2→
     3→from __future__ import annotations
     4→
     5→import re
     6→from pathlib import Path
     7→
     8→from _transcript_common import CLIENTS, slugify
     9→from _transcript_parse import ParsedTranscript
    10→
    11→
    12→def default_global_transcript_root() -> Path:
    13→    return Path.home() / ".memorytree" / "transcripts"
    14→
    15→
    16→def default_client_roots() -> dict[str, Path]:
    17→    home = Path.home()
    18→    return {
    19→        "codex": home / ".codex",
    20→        "claude": home / ".claude",
    21→        "gemini": home / ".gemini",
    22→    }
    23→
    24→
    25→def discover_source_files(clients: set[str] | None = None) -> list[tuple[str, Path]]:
    26→    requested = clients or CLIENTS
    27→    roots = default_client_roots()
    28→    patterns = {
    29→        "codex": ["sessions/**/*.jsonl"],
    30→        "claude": ["projects/**/*.jsonl"],
    31→        "gemini": [
    32→            "tmp/*/checkpoints/**/*.json",
    33→            "tmp/*/checkpoints/**/*.jsonl",
    34→            "history/**/*.json",
    35→            "history/**/*.jsonl",
    36→            "chats/**/*.json",
    37→            "chats/**/*.jsonl",
    38→        ],
    39→    }
    40→    matches: list[tuple[str, Path]] = []
    41→    seen: set[str] = set()
    42→    for client in sorted(requested):
    43→        root = roots.get(client)
    44→        if root is None or not root.exists():
    45→            continue
    46→        for pattern in patterns[client]:
    47→            for path in root.glob(pattern):
    48→                if not path.is_file():
    49→                    continue
    50→                key = path.resolve().as_posix().lower()
    51→                if key in seen:
    52→                    continue
    53→                seen.add(key)
    54→                matches.append((client, path.resolve()))
    55→    matches.sort(
    56→        key=lambda item: (safe_file_mtime(item[1]), item[1].as_posix().lower()),
    57→        reverse=True,
    58→    )
    59→    return matches
    60→
    61→
    62→def infer_project_slug(parsed: ParsedTranscript) -> str:
    63→    if parsed.cwd:
    64→        try:
    65→            cwd_path = Path(parsed.cwd)
    66→            return slugify(cwd_path.name, fallback="project")
    67→        except OSError:
    68→            pass
    69→    if parsed.client == "claude":
    70→        parent_name = parsed.source_path.parent.name
    71→        parent_name = re.sub(r"^[a-z]--", "", parent_name.lower())
    72→        return slugify(parent_name, fallback="project")
    73→    if parsed.client == "gemini" and parsed.source_path.parent.name:
    74→        return slugify(parsed.source_path.parent.name, fallback="project")
    75→    return "unknown-project"
    76→
    77→
    78→def transcript_matches_repo(parsed: ParsedTranscript, repo_root: Path, repo_slug: str) -> bool:
    79→    repo_root = repo_root.resolve()
    80→    if parsed.cwd:
    81→        try:
    82→            cwd_path = Path(parsed.cwd).resolve()
    83→            if cwd_path == repo_root:
    84→                return True
    85→            if repo_root in cwd_path.parents:
    86→                return True
    87→        except OSError:
    88→            pass
    89→    return project_slugs_match(infer_project_slug(parsed), repo_slug)
    90→
    91→
    92→def project_slugs_match(left: str, right: str) -> bool:
    93→    return bool(left and right and left == right and left != "unknown-project")
    94→
    95→
    96→def safe_file_mtime(path: Path) -> float:
    97→    try:
    98→        return path.stat().st_mtime
    99→    except OSError:
   100→        return 0.0
   101→

export interface TranscriptMessage {
  role: string
  text: string
  timestamp: string | null
}

  summary: string

}

  client: Client

Implement the TypeScript file `D:\demo1\memorytree-workflow\src\transcript\parse.ts` and its test file `D:\demo1\memorytree-workflow\tests\transcript\parse.test.ts`.

This is a port of the Python file `D:\demo1\memorytree-workflow\scripts\_transcript_parse.py`.

## IMPORTANT CONSTRAINTS:
- This is an ESM project with `"module": "NodeNext"` in tsconfig.json - all imports MUST use `.js` extensions
- The project uses `strict: true`, `exactOptionalPropertyTypes: true`, and `noUncheckedIndexedAccess: true`
- Types are defined in `src/types/transcript.ts` - import `Client`, `TranscriptMessage`, `TranscriptToolEvent`, `ParsedTranscript` from there
- Common utilities are in `src/transcript/common.ts` - import needed functions from there
- Vitest globals are enabled (describe/it/expect available without import, but import them from 'vitest' in test files)
- Use `readFileSync` from `node:fs` for file reading, `statSync` for getting mtime

## `src/transcript/parse.ts` should export:

1. `inferClient(client: string, sourcePath: string): Client` - Auto-detect client from path:
   - If client !== 'auto', return client (cast to Client)
   - Normalize path to lowercase with forward slashes
   - codex: `/.codex/` in path OR filename matches `rollout-`
   - claude: `/.claude/` in path OR `/projects/` in path
   - gemini: `/.gemini/` in path OR `checkpoint` in path
   - Throw Error if can't infer

2. `parseTranscript(client: string, sourcePath: string): ParsedTranscript` - dispatch to parser

3. `parseCodexTranscript(filePath: string): ParsedTranscript` - JSONL parser for Codex:
   - Load JSONL records via loadJsonl
   - Process record types: session_meta (metadata), response_item/event_msg (content)
   - payload_type "message" → extract text via extractTextBlocks
   - payload_type "user_message"/"agent_message" → simple text
   - payload_type "function_call"/"custom_tool_call" → tool events with input
   - payload_type "function_call_output"/"custom_tool_call_output" → tool events with output
   - Deduplicate messages and tool_events before returning

4. `parseClaudeTranscript(filePath: string): ParsedTranscript` - JSONL parser for Claude:
   - Load JSONL records
   - For each record: extract sessionId, cwd, gitBranch
   - Record types "user"/"assistant" → process message blocks
   - Content blocks: text blocks → text, tool_use → tool event, tool_result → tool event
   - Deduplicate before returning

5. `parseGeminiTranscript(filePath: string): ParsedTranscript` - JSON/JSONL parser for Gemini:
   - If .jsonl suffix → loadJsonl, else → JSON.parse(readFileSync)
   - Find first mapping with metadata keys via findFirstMappingWithKeys
   - Recursive `visit()` traverses entire structure
